 INTRODUCTION 
I.1. Summary 
This document is the user manual for the Copernicus Marine Sea Surface Temperature (SST) 
Ocean Monitoring Indicator (OMI) for the Iberai-Biscay-Irish Seas (NWS). The IBI SST OMI 
belongs to the ocean temperature and salinity (TEMPSAL) OMI family and provides a 1D time 
series of area averaged monthly mean SST anomalies and a 2D map of SST trend for t

catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Product User Manual for Copernicus Marine Sea Surface Temperature Ocean Monitoring Indicator (OMI) for the Iberia-Biscay-Irish Seas, providing details on datasets and product descriptions.

product_line.name: Sea Surface Temperature Ocean Monitoring Indicator for Iberia-Biscay-Irish Seas
